# WorkChores — The Operations Platform

> CRM, vendor management, HR, budgets, and tasks — one platform for the people who run the business.

## About

WorkChores is a CRM and operations platform built for small teams (2-15 people). It sets up in 60 seconds with industry-specific templates and requires no training. Based in Gaithersburg, Maryland.

## Products

- **CRM** — Contact management, deal pipeline, touchpoint tracking, email integration, custom fields, and reporting. Free plan available, Business plan at $5/seat/month.
- **Vendor Management** — Centralize vendor relationships, track contracts, compliance, W9/1099 tax records, and payment schedules.
- **Task Tracker** — Assign tasks, track progress, set priorities and due dates. Coming soon.
- **HR Tracker** — Employee directory, PTO tracking, onboarding checklists. Coming soon.
- **Budget & Forecasting** — Departmental budgets, actuals vs forecast, spend management. Coming soon.

## Key Features

- 60-second setup with 6 industry templates (B2B Sales, SaaS, Real Estate, Recruiting, Consulting, Home Services)
- Drag-and-drop pipeline with customizable stages
- Contact management with addresses, tags, custom fields, and activity history
- Role-based team access (Admin, Manager, Member)
- CSV/Excel import and export
- Email integration via Gmail OAuth
- Interactive demo available at https://workchores.com/demo (no signup required)

## Pricing

- Free: 1 user, unlimited contacts, full CRM features
- Business: $5/seat/month, team collaboration, vendor management, priority support
